hero.title: Deep Research
hero.subtitle: at Your Fingertips
hero.description: Meet BNBOT, your personal Deep Research assistant. With powerful tools like search engines, web crawlers, Python and MCP services, it delivers instant insights, comprehensive reports, and even captivating podcasts.
hero.footnote: * DEER stands for Deep Exploration and Efficient Research.

settings.title: BNBOT Settings
settings.mcpConfigDescription: BNBOT uses the standard JSON MCP config to create a new server.
settings.pasteConfigBelow: Paste your config below and click "Add" to add new servers.

general.title: General
general.maxPlanIterationsDescription: Set to 1 for single-step planning. Set to 2 or more to enable re-planning.
general.maxStepsOfPlan: Max steps of a research plan
general.maxStepsDescription: By default, each research plan has 5 steps.
general.maxSearchResultsDescription: By default, each search step has 5 results.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: The Model Context Protocol boosts BNBOT by integrating external tools for tasks like private domain searches, web browsing, food ordering, and more. Click here to

reportStyle.chooseDesc: Select the writing style for your research reports. Different styles are optimized for different audiences and purposes.
reportStyle.academicDesc: Formal, objective, and analytical with precise terminology
reportStyle.popularScienceDesc: Engaging and accessible for general audience
reportStyle.newsDesc: Factual, concise, and impartial journalistic style

footer.quote: Originated from Open Source, give back to Open Source.

welcome.description: Welcome to 🤖 BNBOT, a deep research assistant built on cutting-edge language models, helps you search on web, browse information, and handle complex tasks.

conversationStarters: How many times taller is the Eiffel Tower than the tallest building in the world?
How many years does an average Tesla battery last compared to a gasoline engine?
How many liters of water are required to produce 1 kg of beef?
How many times faster is the speed of light compared to the speed of sound?

deepThinkingTooltip.title: Deep Thinking Mode: {status}
deepThinkingTooltip.description: When enabled, BNBOT will use reasoning model ({model}) to generate more thoughtful plans.

investigationTooltip.title: Investigation Mode: {status}
investigationTooltip.description: When enabled, BNBOT will perform a quick search before planning. This is useful for researches related to ongoing events and news.

research.errorExecutingCode: Error when executing the above code
research.errorGeneratingPodcast: Error when generating podcast. Please try again.

messages.replayDescription: BNBOT is now replaying the conversation...
messages.replayModeDescription: You're now in BNBOT's replay mode. Click the "Play" button on the right to start.
messages.demoNotice: * This site is for demo purposes only. If you want to try your own question, please
messages.cloneLocally: to clone it locally and run it.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.description: See BNBOT in action through replays.

cases.title: How tall is Eiffel Tower compared to tallest building?
cases.description: The research compares the heights and global significance of the Eiffel Tower and Burj Khalifa, and uses Python code to calculate the multiples.

cases.title: What are the top trending repositories on GitHub?
cases.description: The research utilized MCP services to identify the most popular GitHub repositories and documented them in detail using search engines.

cases.title: Write an article about Nanjing's traditional dishes
cases.description: The study vividly showcases Nanjing's famous dishes through rich content and imagery, uncovering their hidden histories and cultural significance.

cases.title: How to decorate a small rental apartment?
cases.description: The study provides readers with practical and straightforward methods for decorating apartments, accompanied by inspiring images.

cases.title: Introduce the movie 'Léon: The Professional'
cases.description: The research provides a comprehensive introduction to the movie 'Léon: The Professional', including its plot, characters, and themes.

cases.title: How do you view the takeaway war in China? (in Chinese)
cases.description: The research analyzes the intensifying competition between JD and Meituan, highlighting their strategies, technological innovations, and challenges.

cases.title: Are ultra-processed foods linked to health?
cases.description: The research examines the health risks of rising ultra-processed food consumption, urging more research on long-term effects and individual differences.

cases.title: Write an article on "Would you insure your AI twin?"
cases.description: The research explores the concept of insuring AI twins, highlighting their benefits, risks, ethical considerations, and the evolving regulatory.

testimonials.description: The secret behind their exponential growth, in their own words.

0.content: I've tried every Twitter tool out there. This is the only one that helped my clients see real ROI. Trend monitoring is game-changing.
0.name: Marcus Reid

1.content: Our B2B Twitter strategy was failing. Now we're getting 10x engagement and actual leads. The competitor analysis feature is worth it alone.
1.name: Rebecca Stone

2.content: Helped me identify which content will go viral before posting. My last 5 tweets got 100k+ impressions each. This is the secret sauce.
2.name: Emma Davis

3.content: As someone who hates social media, this made Twitter actually useful for our product launches. Analytics are clean and actionable.
3.name: Alex K.

4.content: Replaced 3 different tools with this one platform. Our team's Twitter performance improved 400% and we're saving $200/month. No-brainer.
4.name: Patricia Williams

5.content: We went from 0 to 50k followers in 3 months. The scheduling + auto-reply bot is perfect for founders who don't have time for social media.
5.name: Linda Chen

6.content: The sentiment analysis saved us from a PR disaster. BNBOT alerted us to negative trends instantly so we could pivot our messaging.
6.name: James Wilson

7.content: Incredible ROI. The X Trend agent found a narrative shift 2 days before mainstream crypto twitter caught on. We positioned early and won big.
7.name: Sarah Jenkins

8.content: The content generation is indistinguishable from a human ghostwriter. It captures our brand voice perfectly.
8.name: Michael Chang

featureCards.title: What It Does
featureCards.platformTrendsDesc: Scrape trends from HackerNews, GitHub, Reddit, Product Hunt, Bilibili, Weibo, and 25+ more. Cross-platform convergence detection surfaces what's truly going viral.
featureCards.personalBrandDesc: AI learns your voice and writes like you. Human Score validation ensures nothing sounds like AI. Generate images with Nano Banana Pro.
featureCards.contentRepurposeDesc: Turn YouTube, TikTok, WeChat, Xiaohongshu content into viral X threads. Download videos, add subtitles, remix anything.
featureCards.agentAutomationDesc: Auto-reply, process notifications, run custom tasks, and get follow digests — all while you sleep.
featureCards.xAnalyticsDesc: Track engagement, analyze performance across time ranges, and share analytics screenshots with one click.
featureCards.smartToolsDesc: Multi-account management, ad removal, scheduled posts, draft mode, bookmark summaries, AI replies — everything to make X work for you.
